query: SPC preliminary filtered tornado report counts for July 1 through July 9 in recent years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025). I need the daily or summed number of filtered tornado local storm reports (LSR) from NOAA Storm Prediction Center daily storm reports pages (spc.noaa.gov/climo/reports) for the first 9 days of July each year. Provide per-year totals for July 1-9 if possible.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the findings:

## SPC Filtered Tornado Reports, July 1–9 — Per-Year Totals

| Year | Total (Jul 1–9) | Notable |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| 2021 | **31** | Peak Jul 7–8 (mid-Atlantic/SE) |
| 2022 | **22** | Jul 5–6 cluster (Ohio EF1s) |
| 2023 | **23** | Jul 2 cluster (11; PA/KY) |
| 2024 | **105** | Outlier — Beryl; Jul 8 = 58 reports |
| 2025 | **25** | Jul 6–7 cluster (NC, Ohio, ND) |

**Key takeaways for your forecast:**
- **Median = 25, mean = 41.2** (mean inflated by 2024).
- **Excluding the 2024 Beryl outlier**, the four other years are remarkably consistent: **31, 22, 23, 25** → mean ≈ 25.3. This is the "typical" baseline for the window.
- **The dominant tail risk is a tropical cyclone.** 2024's 105 came almost entirely from Beryl's remnants (Jul 8 = 58 reports across LA/TX/AR). Without a tropical system, early-July daily counts are usually low single digits, dominated by weak High-Plains landspouts and QLCS spin-ups.
- **High day-to-day variance:** 10 of 45 days had zero reports.

Data was pulled directly from the SPC daily filtered tornado CSVs (`spc.noaa.gov/climo/reports/YYMMDD_rpts_filtered_torn.csv`) and counts were verified. Note these are **preliminary filtered LSR counts**, not finalized Storm Data tornado counts.

sources.title: NOAA Storm Prediction Center - Daily Storm Reports (filtered tornado CSV product)
sources.snippet: Filtered tornado LSR CSV files (YYMMDD_rpts_filtered_torn.csv) for July 1-9, 2021-2025.

data_points.metric: Filtered tornado reports single day (Beryl, max in dataset)
Mean filtered tornado reports July 1-9 excluding 2024 outlier
